steps.t: Cryptic as it may be, it appears the shade is looking for something. Perhaps you can search the many barrows throughout the north Barrow-downs for clu…
The Wandering Shade's barrow is in the northern Barrow-downs. Your investigation lead you to a barrow where the earth was recently disturbed by the mo…
The Wandering Shade roams the northern Barrow-downs. You have found the Wandering Shade's ring and should now return it to its owner.
